title: Financial Market and Growth: Evidence from Post-reforms India

summary.about: The relationship between India’s stock and credit markets and economic growth after liberalization.
summary.audience: Financial regulators, economists and capital-market policymakers.
summary.method: Analyzes stationary time-series variables from 1994–2010 and tests long-run relationships with GDP.
summary.insights: Stock-market development has stronger and more significant long-run links with growth than credit-market development.
